text:
Author: delphij
Date: Thu May 15 21:22:17 2014
New Revision: 354174
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354174
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354174/

Log:
  openX open source is now obsolete in favor of the new Revive-adserver.
  
  This changeset is primarily based on the (*) change submitted by Volodymyr
  Kostyrko <arcade b1t name> who have offered to keep the existing maintainer
  of OpenX.
  
  PR:		ports/186606, ports/189439 (*)
  Security:	CVE-2013-7149

Added:
  head/www/revive-adserver/
     - copied from r354168, head/www/openx/
Deleted:
  head/www/openx/
Modified:
  head/MOVED
  head/www/Makefile
  head/www/revive-adserver/Makefile
  head/www/revive-adserver/distinfo
  head/www/revive-adserver/files/pkg-message.in

==============================================================================
--- head/www/openx/Makefile	Thu May 15 19:24:03 2014	(r354168)
+++ head/www/revive-adserver/Makefile	Thu May 15 21:22:17 2014	(r354174)
@@ -1,24 +1,21 @@
 # Created by: Piotr Rybicki <meritus@innervision.pl>
 # $FreeBSD$
 
-PORTNAME=	openx
-PORTVERSION=	2.8.11
+PORTNAME=	revive-adserver
+PORTVERSION=	3.0.5
 CATEGORIES=	www
-MASTER_SITES=	http://download.openx.org/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://download.revive-adserver.org/
 
 MAINTAINER=	meritus@innervision.pl
 COMMENT=	Free, opensource ad server in PHP
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
-FORBIDDEN=	CVE-2013-7149
-
-USE_BZIP2=	yes
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 SUB_LIST+=	PKGNAME=${PKGNAME}
 SUB_FILES+=	pkg-message
+PLIST_SUB+=	WWWOWN="${WWWOWN}" WWWGRP="${WWWGRP}"
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 .if !defined(WITHOUT_PHP_DEPENDS)
@@ -26,11 +23,7 @@ USE_PHP=	xml pcre zlib mysql pgsql ftp
 .endif
 
 do-install:
-	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${WWWDIR}
-	@${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${WWWDIR}
-	@${CHMOD} -R 755 ${WWWDIR}
-	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${WWWDIR}' >> ${TMPPLIST}
-	@${ECHO_CMD} '@exec ${CHMOD} -R 755 ${WWWDIR}' >> ${TMPPLIST}
+	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${STAGEDIR}${WWWDIR}
 
 post-install:
 	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}

@@ -3,12 +3,12 @@
 
     %%WWWDIR%%
 
-To make OpenX available through your web site, I suggest
+To make Revive-Adserver available through your web site, I suggest
 that you add something like the following to httpd.conf:
 
    ### Add the AcceptPathInfo directive only for Apache 2.0.30 or later.
 
-   Alias /openx %%WWWDIR%%/
+   Alias /ads %%WWWDIR%%/
 
    AcceptPathInfo On
 
@@ -20,6 +20,6 @@ that you add something like the followin
 
 Also create a cron job to run maintenance schedule (as user www)
 
-0 * * * * /usr/local/bin/php /usr/local/www/openx/scripts/maintenance/maintenance.php www.mydomain.com
+0 * * * * /usr/local/bin/php %%WWWDIR%%/scripts/maintenance/maintenance.php www.mydomain.com
 
 * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

+++ head/www/revive-adserver/pkg-descr	Thu May 15 21:22:17 2014	(r354174)
@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
-OpenX is a hugely popular, free ad server designed by web publishers for web
-publishers. It provides everything you need to manage your online advertising.
-Make more money from online advertising today.
+Revive AdServer is a hugely popular, free ad server designed by web publishers
+for web publishers. It provides everything you need to manage your online
+advertising.  Make more money from online advertising today.
 
-OpenX gives you:
+Revive AdServer gives you:
 
 Control:
   Maximise your revenue by showing the right ad campaigns to the right people.
@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@ Transparency:
 Freedom:
   Free to mix direct, network and house ads to optimise your revenue per page.
 
-OpenX obsoletes OpenAds, which obsoletes phpAdsNew2.
+Revive AdServer obsoletes OpenX, which obsoletes OpenAds, which obsoletes
+phpAdsNew2.
 
-WWW: http://www.openx.org/
+WWW: http://www.revive-adserver.org/
